_comment: Not a live capture, not a real platform — a hand-built JSON feed fixture, deliberately shaped nothing like demo_platform's HTML or RentCast's schema. Built for the SDK Validation Sprint (see docs/22_SDK_Validation_Sprint.md) to prove the SDK works against a third, structurally different data shape without any change to the SDK itself, and to stress-test RawListing/Apartment field coverage. `room_category` is deliberately present and deliberately NOT mapped by normalize() — there is no RawListing field for it; see docs/22 finding 1.

listings.headline: Sunny One-Bedroom Near the Park
listings.summary: A bright one-bedroom two blocks from the park, recently repainted.
